entries.title: Call with John Tabor — March 2026
entries.body:
**Context:** Tabor called after reading Housing Authority board application.

**Key takeaways:**
- Committee tasked with turning advocate framework into executable action plan
- Housing is complex — combination of removing zoning barriers, putting more land into use, increasing density, financial tools
- Getting a crash course in land use regulation is a major area of progress
- Always looking at tax abatements, tax deferrals as financial levers
- Mentioned Nashua as a city to study for enabling legislation
- Zoning rewrite is a major 2027 goal

**My questions to follow up on:**
- Which zoning provisions are the biggest bottlenecks right now?
- Has the GNOD generated developer interest since it passed?
- Is the Housing Trust Fund being actively deployed?
- Where would a data/analytics lens be most useful?
